## Description
Provide a summary of the changes introduced by this Pull Request. List any dependencies added or modified.

## Type of Change
Select the type of change applied (mark with `x`):
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change resolving an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change adding capabilities)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature requiring API alterations)
- [ ] Documentation update (no source code changed)

## How Has This Been Tested?
Describe the tests performed to verify changes (e.g. running locally on target browsers, device responsiveness, performance loop frame rates).

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the code style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation in the `docs/` workspace accordingly.
- [ ] My changes compile cleanly (`npm run build` runs successfully).
- [ ] I have verified that my changes work inside the developer playground.
